input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.4.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.4.3.1
            TITLE: dry tires

            CONTENT:
            rule V.4.3.1: Dry Tires
V.4.3.1 Dry Tires 
a. The tires on the vehicle when it is presented for Technical Inspection.  
b. May be any size or type, slicks or treaded.

final_answer: rule V.4.3.1: Dry Tires V.4.3.1 Dry Tires a. The tires on the vehicle when it is presented for Technical Inspection. b. May be any size or type, slicks or treaded.
